name: Mio 60" Floor Lamo - FLL3006 - Natural/Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Mio Floor Lamp, a stylish and functional piece designed to complement any room. This lamp combines the natural elegance of cane with the sleek durability of iron, presented in a sophisticated black finish. The Mio Floor Lamp brings a tasteful ambiance to your environment, blending seamlessly with both contemporary and traditional decors. The image provided showcases the lamp's attention to detail and craftsmanship with a sleek in-line switch, emphasizing its modern design. Add this versatile lighting option to your home or office and enjoy the blend of practicality and aesthetics it provides.
